## Scope

- [ ] Fits the Python SDK's open-source Core boundary.
- [ ] Does not add Hosted listings, orders, billing, wallet, or account behavior.
- [ ] Does not include secrets, private URLs, user data, or local environment files.

## Validation

- [ ] Ruff, compileall, pytest, and package build were run as applicable.
- [ ] Documentation and typing were updated, or no update is needed.
- [ ] Security-sensitive behavior was reviewed, or this change is not security-sensitive.

## Notes

Link related issues and state Core/Runtime compatibility or migration impact.
